full_text:
LC-MS Protocol

Day 0

Prepare reagents

Xylene

xylene in 3 boxes

Ethanol solutions (100%, 90%, 70%, 50%, 30%)

300 ml 100% Ethanol

300 ml 90% Ethanol - 270 ml Ethanol + 30 ml MQ

300 ml 70% Ethanol - 210 ml Ethanol + 90 ml MQ

300 ml 50% Ethanol - 150 ml Ethanol + 150 ml MQ

300 ml 30% Ethanol - 90 ml Ethanol + 210 ml MQ

1x Tris-buffered saline (TBS) buffer (50 mM Tris-HCl, pH 7.4; 150 mM NaCl) in MQ

Prepare 3 L - 300 ml 10x TBS Add 2.7L MQ

10 mM citric acid buffer, pH 6.0 in MQ

Prepare 300 ml - 30 ml 10x citric acid into 270 ml MQ

Odyssey blocking buffer

Urea buffer (50 mM Tris, 6 M Urea (360.36 g/1L), protease and phosphatase inhibitors (tablets in +4), pH 7.5-8) (Urea in grey bottle)

For 50 ml Urea buffer, add 18.02g Urea

Add 2.5 ml 1M Tris-HCl and 30 ml MQ

After resolving, add around 2ml to 50ml

Add 5 tablets of protease inhibitor

Add 5 tablets of phosphatase inhibitors

milliQ water

Remove the first 250 ml, we need at least 4L

Day 1

Baking

After sectioning, slides were baked at 56°C for 60 min to ensure the tissue was properly attached to the slide.

Dewaxing (approx. 1 h)

Deparaffinization + rehydration:

3 x 5 min Xylene

1 x 3 min 100% ethanol

1 x 3 min 90% ethanol

1 x 3 min 70% ethanol

1 x 3 min 30% ethanol

2 x 1 min TBS

Antigen retrieval

65°C for 30 min in 225 mL 10 mM citric acid buffer; for test, one slide is at 90°C for 30 min. Afterwards, the slides were taken out to cool down for 20 min at room temperature and then washed three times for 1 min each in 1x TBS buffer.

Blocking

Odyssey Buffer

Prepare a moist incubation chamber. Dry the surroundings of the tissue section. Without letting the tissue dry, quickly add 200 μl Odyssey blocking buffer and incubate for 30 min at RT.

Wash with 1x TBS for 3 min.

Stain with pre-conjugated antibodies and Hoechst at +4°C overnight.

Day 2

1x TBS wash three times, 3 min each.

Take 0.5ml PCR tubes and 96-well PCR plates to FIMM, dry the slide, and then load the slides into the system.

Collect area of 5000 um2, 8000 um2, 30000 um2, 1 or 2 in each well with urea buffer

Fast froze the plate and sent it to Turku for proteomics analysis
